title: Doff Natural Rooting Powder Promotes Strong Healthy Roots 75G
features: Contains as natural source of seaweed to increase propagation.
Also use for dipping plugs all year round.
For use on soft semi-hard and hardwood plants.
Use on a variety of indoor and outdoor cuttings.
description: Product Description Doff rooting powder is a growth supplement containing a natural source of seaweed to improve conditions to rapidly encourage healthy root development in both indoor and outdoor cuttings. It is ideal for grafting young plants to increase the rooting rate. Doff rooting powder is successful with soft, medium and hardwood cuttings through spring and can be used all year round with a heated propagator. Suitable for use with edible cuttings and bulbs. To avoid cross-contamination place some powder from the tub in a small dish, dip the cutting in water, then dip into the powder and place the cutting in your preferred growing medium. Ingredients Natural Ingredients Directions 1. Cut straight across below a leaf joint or bud. 2. Remove leaves from the lower third of cutting. 3. Dip prepared cutting 25mm into rooting powder. 4. Plant coated hole in growing media propagation plug. Safety Warning Keep out of reach children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical help immediately. Legal Disclaimer Product Description Doff - The Great British Gardening Co. Providing 'beautiful, healthy gardens and pest free environments for everyone'. Promotes strong healthy roots. Easy to use hormone rooting powder. For use on soft semi-hard and hardwood plants. Helps form new roots on cuttings. Use all year round.
